posts.author: elasticday (ElasticDay)
posts.cookedHtml:
[Use Case] Ready to take your content creation to the next-level? with AI Copilot - No more time-consuming in content creation and modification.

There are various methods that can be used for AI writing WorkDocs on monday.com using AI Copilot such as create summaries of texts, text generation, generating product descriptions and landing page copy, writing articles or blogs, writing sales emails or cold emails, expanding sentences, paraphrasing or rewriting, creating social media copy or any content you like.

You will be able to execute these commands on your WorkDocs:

  • Simplify Content.

  • Summarize Content.

  • Make it larger

  • Generate Keywords.

  • Generate Hashtags.

  • Generate Article.

  • Correct Grammar.

You can perform the commands on:

  • Selected text (can be part of sentence, full section …etc)

  • Selected section.

  • Selected multiple sections.

  • All content in Doc

AI Copilot: Single AI App for everything.

You don’t need to add single app for single purpose to your account from your marketplace, you can use AI Copilot for everything:

  • Parsing CVs.

  • Parsing Invoices and reports.

  • Summarize PDF files.

  • Extract text from images.

  • Extract text from files.

  • Create items.

  • Generate items updates.

  • and more cases …

Secure Monday Marketplace Link: monday.com: Apps Marketplace
See our channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCx4Iv0T2HcG_NwsWs_4KDVQ

posts.author: Teluxora (Teluxora)
posts.cookedHtml: AI Copilot could be a total game-changer for you if you’re looking to step up your content game without spending hours on it. Whether drafting, editing or even tweaking existing content, the process is much faster and smoother.
